Ordinal_100_xrefs.notes: Only called from entry point via CALLF

findings.explanation: No cross-references found for any string addresses. This is expected behavior for VB3 P-Code binaries. The strings are NOT referenced via x86 address pointers. Instead, they are embedded within VB3 P-Code control structures (forms, controls, event handlers). The VB3 runtime (VBRUN300.DLL) interprets the P-Code bytecode which contains relative offsets to these strings within each segment. Ghidra's x86 analysis cannot track these P-Code-level references.

relocations.pattern: Most relocations are segment-relative fixups in Code3 (1010:xxxx), spacing ~0x38 bytes apart, suggesting an array of VB control/form descriptors with embedded segment references
relocations.notes: These relocations fixup segment addresses within VB3's internal data structures (form tables, control arrays, event dispatch tables)
